nasb.text: Now when she had finished giving him a drink, she said, “I will draw also for your camels until they have finished drinking.”

esv.text: When she had finished giving him a drink, she said, “I will draw water for your camels also, until they have finished drinking.”

cnv.text: 他喝足了，少女就說：“我也要為你的駱駝打水，直到牠們都喝足了。”

ccb.text: 等他喝完以后，利百加又说：“我再为你的骆驼打些水来，让它们喝个饱。”

csbs.text: 那少女给他喝够了以后，又说：“我也为你的骆驼打水，直到它们喝够了。”
